channel.title: Morning Gas & Energy Brief
channel.description: Phil's weekday morning brief: North American natural gas, Alberta weather and Lower-48 degree days, energy M&A, and geopolitics. Generated and narrated by Claude.
channel.itunes:author: Claude for Phil

item.title: Thu Jul 23 — Gas tests $2.80 ahead of storage report
item.description: Henry Hub pinned near $2.80 into today's EIA print; Freeport turnaround and record supply weigh; TTF tops €60 on the Iran war; Magnolia buys WildFire for ~$4B; Calgary heat in the low 30s.

item.title: Wed Jul 22 — Gas tests two-month low as Hormuz burns
item.description: Henry Hub defends $2.85 amid record supply and Freeport maintenance; tankers ablaze in Hormuz lift TTF to a four-month high; ARC-Shell advances.

item.title: Tue Jul 21 — Gas pinned at two-month low near $2.84
item.description: August NYMEX slips to ~$2.84 on record production, +181 Bcf storage surplus and Freeport outage; Calgary heat builds; Magnolia buys WildFire for $4.06B; TTF up 42% on month as Hormuz stays shut.

item.title: Mon Jul 20 — Gas near $2.90 as Brent's $90 spike fades
item.description: Friday's TTF-driven bounce meets heavy US fundamentals; Iran hits Kuwait plant; Freeport out to late August; storage +41 Bcf; Calgary warms to 30 by Thursday.

item.title: Fri Jul 17 — Storage build sinks gas near six-week lows
item.description: EIA's 41 Bcf build reads bearish; Freeport trips and restarts; TTF at €55 on Hormuz risk; Alberta warm into next week.

item.title: Wed Jul 15 — ARC approves Shell deal; gas chops $3 with Freeport dark
item.description: ARC votes 99.5% for Shell's $16.4B takeover; Henry Hub chops $3 with Freeport out to late August; hot ridge keeps burn huge; Brent $86 on Hormuz risk.

item.title: Mon Jul 13 — Gas steadies above three as Freeport goes dark
item.description: Henry Hub holds ~.16 after a bearish storage miss; record heat dome heads east; ARC-Shell vote Tuesday; US-Iran skirmishes lift crude.

item.title: Sat Jul 11 — Sample: gas limps into the weekend
item.description: Aug NYMEX slides to $2.89; bearish 61 Bcf build; Freeport turnaround begins. Two-minute sample episode.
